prerequisites.value: Str 13, Dex 13, Swift Iron Style, proficiency with medium armor.

description.value: **Benefit:** Once per day when using Swift Iron Style, when youâre hit by a weapon, unarmed attack, or natural weapon, you can treat all dice other than the weaponâs base damage dice (including extra dice from sneak attack, critical hit, magic special weapon abilities, and Vital Strike ) as having rolled 1s. You can use this ability a second time per day when your base attack bonus reaches +8, and a third time at +16.
